user.title: Configure MiPower
user.description: Choose how to configure: manually or select an existing Home Assistant device (media_player).

issues.no_bluetoothctl: bluetoothctl not found on host. Ensure BlueZ is installed and Home Assistant has access to bluetoothctl.
issues.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address format. Use AA:BB:CC:11:22:33.
issues.no_ha_device_found: No suitable media_player devices found in Home Assistant to select.

options.display_name_description: Friendly name to show for the created entity.
options.mac_description: Bluetooth MAC address of the target device (optional if detected from selected device).
options.device_id_description: Select the media_player device (from device registry) to control.
options.off_debounce_description: Number of seconds to ignore repeated OFF signals after the device turns off.
options.on_debounce_description: Number of seconds to ignore repeated ON signals after the device turns on.
options.connect_timeout_description: Timeout for a single connect/wakeup attempt in seconds.
options.cleanup_on_unload_description: Automatically remove __pycache__ directories when the integration is unloaded.
